label: Squarish 2BR / 1 common bath + powder room — master front-left, standard rear-left, rear band right side has common bath then powder room then kitchen, open-plan great room takes the front-right. Powder room doors into the great room.

adjacencies.note: master (front) and standard (rear) stack vertically along the left wall. Shared wall only, no door.
master's east wall faces great room — hosts master's bedroom door.
standard's east wall overlaps great room's west wall — hosts standard's door. 1.2 m floor gives 0.8 m clear door + 0.15 m frame each side.
common is just east of standard at the rear; shared wall only, no door.
common's south wall faces great room — door into great for shared access by both bedrooms.
common and powder_room share a plumbing wall — powder_room is east of common in the rear band. Stacks both wet rooms for a single rear service riser.
powder_room's south wall faces great room — door into great for guest access. Powder room sits in the rear band east of common, so its south face touches the great room's north face.
powder_room and kitchen share a plumbing wall — kitchen is east of powder_room, right-anchored. Extends the rear wet-stack: common — powder_room — kitchen.
great_room + kitchen form the open LDK (gr style).

notes: Squarish 2BR topology with ONE common bath + ONE powder room (half-bath).
bath_token: 'bath_pwd' — extends the locked naming convention for single common bath + powder room.
The rear band has FOUR rooms west-to-east:
Plumbing train: common — powder_room — kitchen all share rear wet walls,
collapsing three service points onto one rear riser.
Doors from the great room's north (rear) wall:
- Common bath door (south face of common overlaps great's north face)
- Powder room door (south face of powder_room overlaps great's north face)
Both doors open directly into the great room — guest-accessible without
Recommended lot: 14×12 or similar (buildable ≥ 10×8 = 80 sqm). The four-room
rear band + private ≥ public zone floor means lots wider than ~11 m buildable
become infeasible (public zone dominates). Tested at 14×12 (buildable 10×8).
Carport and dirty_kitchen behave identically to sq_side_split_bath_gr.
